hooks.command: cd /Users/jpiraguha/dev/my-personal-website && git add -A && if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//;s/,/, /g') && COUNT=$(git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && EXTRA=$((COUNT > 3 ? COUNT - 3 : 0)) && MSG="update $FILES" && [ "$EXTRA" -gt 0 ] && MSG="$MSG (+$EXTRA more)"; git commit -m "auto: $MSG"; fi 2>/dev/null || true
